name: kcc-dev-workflow
description: Orchestrates a feature from idea to QA test cases. Phase -1 detects resumable prior runs (idempotent team / task chain / per-step fast-path). Phase 0 (step-brainstorm, main session) produces kickoff.md (10 sections incl. §UX Direction) plus — for UI-surface features — a user-approved ui-kickoff.html visual ground truth via an unbounded Approve/Abort discussion loop. A 6-teammate team then chains spec → UI/UX → AC → multi-agent review+rewrite (spec+ui+ac, 4 personas incl. UX lens auditing faithfulness to the HTML) → test cases → multi-agent review+rewrite. Leverages superpowers:brainstorming and kcc-testing:write-test-cases when present; self-contained Path B fallback otherwise. Part 2 (build-feature) is a placeholder.
